title: lupinus arbustus subsp. arbustus
intro: Lupinus arbustus subsp. arbustus, also known as the shrubby lupine, is a plant species belonging to the lupine genus and native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lupinus arbustus subsp. arbustus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that the plant should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
